variants.name: 锈刃领袖
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家，他死亡。[+0/1外来者，爪牙们决定你是谁]
variants.firstNightReminder: During the Minion info step, inform the Minions the Cawthane is in play. They point to players: move the "Coronation" reminder besides the player who got the most votes. Replace their token with the Cawthane's, and inform them they are now the evil Cawthane.
variants.otherNightReminder: The Cawthane points to a player. That player dies.

variants.name: 锈刃领袖
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。[+0/1外来者，爪牙们决定你是谁]
variants.firstNightReminder: 让爪牙们决定谁是锈刃领袖。
variants.otherNightReminder: 唤醒锈刃领袖，让他攻击一名玩家。
